problem id: e55d1044
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND SHR(1)

examples:
  01010001 -> 00000000
  00100110 -> 00010000
  11111001 -> 01100100
  01001111 -> 00100101
  10110001 -> 01000000
  11001000 -> 00100000
  11100110 -> 00010011
  10110010 -> 01001000
  00001010 -> 00000000
  01100111 -> 00010001

query: 10000100
predicted answer: 00000010
